title: Lamb Skewers with Greek Butter
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dish featuring lamb skewers glazed with a rich, buttery Greek sauce.

ingredients.name: Lamb shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: Make sure to trim any excess fat

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat (400°F).
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together the butter, yogurt, garlic, oregano, lemon juice, and honey until well combined.
Brush the Greek butter mixture evenly onto both sides of the lamb skewers.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill the lamb skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh oregano if desired.
